steps.title: Locate the narrator's reason
steps.content: The narrator says he could not remember what Mala Aunty looked like. He then goes to look at family photographs, hoping they will help fill that gap.

steps.title: Avoid unsupported motives
steps.content: A invents a story-writing purpose. B shifts attention to his father's clothing, and D says he wants to remind his aunt of an event, which the passage never suggests. The answer is C.
